---
title: "."
format:
    revealjs:
        title-slide-attributes:
            data-background-image: figs/dalmash/bank.png
            data-background-size: 250px
        width: 1600
        height: 900
        margin: 0.1
        theme: [default, css/style.scss]
        css: [css/style.css, css/buttons.css, css/tabs.css, css/callouts.css, css/nav.css, css/revealhacks.css]
        subtitle: ""
        author: ""
        toc: FALSE
        incremental: FALSE
        slide-number: true
        # auto-animate-easing: ease-in-out
        auto-animate-unmatched: false
        auto-animate-duration: 1.5   
        transition: convex
        background-transition: fade
        logo: figs/dalmash/bank.png
        ligthbox: auto
        engine: jupyter            
include-in-header:
    file: scripts/scripts.js

editor: source
---


## {.center}

{{< include _title.qmd >}}

## {.scrollable}

{{< include _aboutme.qmd >}}

## What `dalmash` is? {.scrollable}

{{< include _dalmash.qmd >}}

## What `dalmash` does? {.scrollable background-color="white"}
{{< include _features.qmd >}}

## Who `dalmash` is for? {.scrollable background-color="white"}


{{< include _users.qmd >}}

<!-- The end -->
## {.center}
{{< include _theend.qmd >}}
